body.sql: SELECT *, `events_total` AS `_value_`, `dtEventTimeStamp` AS `_timestamp_` FROM (SELECT CAST(dimensions['retry_count'] AS BIGINT) AS `dimensions.retry_count`, `dtEventTime`, `dtEventTimeStamp`, `events_total`, `path`, `thedate` FROM `golden_union_history`.doris WHERE `dtEventTimeStamp` >= 1784701776000 AND `dtEventTimeStamp` <= 1784702076000 AND `dtEventTime` >= '2026-07-22 14:29:36' AND `dtEventTime` <= '2026-07-22 14:34:37' AND `thedate` = '20260722' UNION ALL SELECT CAST(dimensions['retry_count'] AS BIGINT) AS `dimensions.retry_count`, `dtEventTime`, `dtEventTimeStamp`, `events_total`, `path`, `thedate` FROM `golden_union_current`.doris WHERE `dtEventTimeStamp` >= 1784701776000 AND `dtEventTimeStamp` <= 1784702076000 AND `dtEventTime` >= '2026-07-22 14:29:36' AND `dtEventTime` <= '2026-07-22 14:34:37' AND `thedate` = '20260722') AS combined_data ORDER BY `_timestamp_` ASC LIMIT 10
